zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Montfort於1374年之後出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾可爾希爾時，他的父親Baldwin de Montfort8642歲，母親Margaret Clinton8649歲。他於1399年與Margaret Peche在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1375年住在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 吉福德。他去世於1452年12月6日在英國瓦維其可爾可爾希爾，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾阿爾德里奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Montfort was born after 1374, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Baldwin de Montfort, was 8642 and his mother, Margaret Clinton, was 8649. He married Margaret Peche in 1399, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom in 1375. He died on 6 December 1452, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, and was buried in Aldridge, Staffordshire, England.

Il a épousé Margaret Peche en 1399, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1375. Il est décédé le 6 décembre 1452, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Aldridge, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Montfortが1374年以後にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコーレシュイルで生まれた時，父Baldwin de Montfortは8642歳，母Margaret Clintonは8649歳であった。1399年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでMargaret Pecheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年にはイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストク ギフォードに住んでいた。彼は1452年12月6日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコーレシュイルで死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアアルドリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Montfort(이)가 1374년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콜레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baldwin de Montfort(은)는 8642세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Clinton(은)는 8649세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Margaret Peche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1375년도에 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스토크 지퍼드에서 살았다. 그는 1452년 12월 6일 영국 워윅실르 콜레시에서 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 올드리지에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Peche em 1399, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1375. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Montfort родился после 1374 г. в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Baldwin de Montfort было 8642 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Clinton, 8649. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Peche в 1399 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности сток гиффорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в 1375 году. Он умер 6 декабря 1452 г. в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности алдридж, стаффордшир, Англия.
